response.overview: 3 People are all enthused in getting some meat, they call for help, a local experienced resident comes out, he helps them se traps and they hide. He made a clear rule about NOT looking at the meat when it comes, one of them doesn't care and looks, then his body gets torn up by the violent meat. The meat then goes missing.
response.tagline: Meat Grinders, Meat Grinders; No, Meat Finders!
response.title: Meat Finders
